{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Chief Guardians
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The three [[Chief Guardians of Dreadnought City]] are Archlords with advanced [[Remnants]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Chief Guardians]]' [[Remnants]] include an eagle of lightning, a blue angular crystal creature, and a [[steel]] fusion of a crab and a praying mantis.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Remnants]]
